page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Canu is a fork of the Celera Assembler designed for high-noise single-molecule sequencing.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: De-novo assembly tool for long read chemistry like nanopore data and pacbio data.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: De-novo assembly tool for long read chemistry like Nanopore data and PacBio data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: De-novo assembly tool for long read chemistry like Nanopore data and PacBio data.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Canu is a hierarchical assembly pipeline designed for high-noise single-molecule sequencing (such as the PacBio RS II/Sequel or Oxford Nanopore MinION).
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: De-novo assembly tool for long read chemistry like Nanopore data and PacBio data.
